Home / Fortnite / Fortnite by Game Mode / Battle Royale / AIs / Missing Features (Creative)

Missing Features (Creative)

Overview

This page documents features that are available in one of Fortnite's official modes, but are not currently available in Creative.

Common Reasons for Missing Features


Feature Optimisation

Some features may need additional optimization for Fortnite Creative.

Save the World Features

Features from Save the World are typically not present in Fortnite Creative, so they are excluded from this list.

Event-Exclusive Features

Event-exclusive features are usually removed from the game files completely after their respective event ends.

LEGO Fortnite

LEGO Islands in Fortnite Creative have their own unique set of items and features inspired by Fortnite: Battle Royale, so items from Odyssey and Brick Life are not currently accessible. For a full list of these items, see LEGO Fortnite: Full List of Items.

List of Missing Features
  • Weapons
  • Items
  • Mechanics
  • Galleries
  • Collaborations

  • Assault Rifles
  • Shotguns
  • Submachine Guns
  • Pistols
  • Sniper Rifles
  • Bows/Crossbows
  • Launchers
  • Melee Weapons

Item Rarity Notes Origin Reason
Unique Items

Playground Spawnables

 Common Items that allowed the player to spawn in minigame challenges in Playground. Playground Not optimised for Creative.
Uncommon
Rare
Epic
Legendary

Reality Seed

 Uncommon Used to plant a a Reality Sapling. Battle Royale Items dependent on persistence are generally not available in Creative.

Sneaky Snowmando

 Rare Disguise yourself as a snowman. Battle Royale Unknown.

Sneaky Snowman (Chapter 7)

 Common Disguises the player as a snowman. Doesn't cause an explosion upon destruction, unlike its Chapter 1 version. Battle Royale Unknown.

Spiky Stadium

 Rare Spawns a Bounce and Spike trap arena. Playground Throwing this item in mass could cause severe lag.

Tent

 Rare Store items between matches. Battle Royale Items dependent on persistence are generally not available in Creative.

Upgrade Bench

 Rare Throw down an Upgrade Bench. Battle Royale Unknown.

Zapper Trap

 Epic Throw down a Zapper Trap. Battle Royale Removed due to a persistent issue that caused the trap to not place.

The Wall

 Common Spawns a small wall made out of multiple segments. Fortnite: Ballistic Unknown.

Item Rarity Notes Origin Reason
Unique Items

Bouncy Egg

 Common An egg that gives you 5 shields and the Hop Rock effect when consumed. Battle Royale Unknown.

Bandage Bazooka

 Rare Version of the Bandage Bazooka that only takes up 1 inventory slot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Golden Truffle

 Mythic Instantly restores 100 Shield when consumed Blitz Royale Likely wasn't meant to be relased, as it was vaulted shortly after being introduced.

Instant Shield

 Exotic Grants 25 shield when purchased. Ballistic Unintended for use outside of Ballistic.

Klomberry

 Uncommon Heals 10 HP. Used to feed Klombos. Battle Royale Removed from the files.

Med-Mist Smoke Grenade

 Common Obscures your location while healing you, perfect for the prevention and relief of bullet wounds. Ballistic Unknown, likely an oversight.

Self-Revive Device

 Legendary Grants the ability to Self-Revive while Knocked Down. Battle Royale Unknown.

Spicy Slapperoni Slice

 Exotic Grants a speed boost alongside healing and the Slap effect. Reload Unknown.

Item Rarity Notes Origin Reason
Unique Items

Blitz Rocket Ram

 Mythic Blitz version of the Rocket Ram. Blitz Royale Unknown.

Grab-itron

 Epic Allows players to pick up and throw any prop. Battle Royale Removed from the files.

Icy Feet

 Rare Allows players to manually activate/deactivate the icy feet mechanic. Battle Royale Unknown.

Portal Device

 Legendary Used to seal rifts in Zero Crisis Finale and eliminate players in Impostors. Impostors Its function is dependent on its appearances, both of which are specific to the mode it is present in.

Prop-ifier

 Rare Allows players to turn into a selected prop. Battle Royale Similar to the Prop-O-Matic and its limited selection of props may limit its use cases.

Storm Beast's Pom Poms

 Epic Allows players to transform into a Storm Beast. Battle Royale Likely complicated to optimise.

Balloon Boom Box

 Epic Launches enemies away with balloons Delulu Unknown.

Friend Zone Bubble

 Exotic Creates a large transparent shield dome around its landing spot which is able to block projectiles and gunfire. Delulu Unknown.

Kits

 Mythic Transforms the playerinto a boss. Battle Royale Likely complicated to optimise.

Smoke Cloud

 Common Produces a large cloud of smoke, obscuring an area from view. Battle Royale: Zero Build Unknown.

Brick-A-Bunker

 Common Instantly constructs a small bunker made of brick. Battle Royale: Zero Build Unknown.

Pocket Shockwave Grenade

 Epic A Shockwave Grenade that slowly recharges over time. Battle Royale: Zero Build Unknown.

Pocket Med-Mist Grenade

 Rare A Med-Mist Smoke Grenade that slowly recharges over time. Battle Royale: Zero Build Unknown.

Pocket Shield Bubble

 Rare A Shield Bubble that slowly recharges over time. Battle Royale: Zero Build Unknown.

 Legendary Marks hidden treasure on the map. Battle Royale Specifially programmed for Battle Royale's map and fixed terrain.

Choppa Parts

 Rare Used to repair the Choppa. Impossible Escape! Removed from the files.

Hunter's Cloak

 Uncommon Tame animals while wearing it. Battle Royale Unknown

Tire Transformation

 Mythic Transform into a pile of tires. Fracture Removed from the files.

Exotic Leaping-Lightning Gun

 Exotic Exotic variant of the Arc-Lightning Gun that grants the Low Gravity effect. Relaod Unknown.
Missing Rarities

Jetpack

 Rare Rare and Epic variants of the Jetpack. Spy Games Unknown.
Epic
Alternate Versions of Present Item

Jewel

 Rare Bring this to the Getaway van! The Getaway Unknown.

Blitz Chains of Hades

 Mythic Blitz version of the Chains of Hades. Blitz Royale Has the same stats as its base version.
OG Variants

Jetpack

 Legendary OG variant of the Jetpack. Fortnite OG Removed from the files.

Unique Items

Jump Pad (Directional)

 Rare Launches the player into a horizontal direction. Fortnite OG Unknown.

Jump Pad (Up)

 Rare Launches the player upwards. Fortnite OG Unknown.
OG Variants

Damage Trap

 Rare Retractable spikes that deal damage to players. Can only be placed on floor tiles. Fortnite OG Unknown.

Bouncer

 Rare OG variant of the Bouncer. Fortnite OG Unknown.

Item Rarity Notes Origin Reason
Unique Items

Bars

 Common Spend Bars in various locations in Battle Royale. Battle Royale Creative has Gold instead.

BluGlo

 Uncommon Used in various missions in Save the World. Save the World Unknown.

Credits

 Common Currency used in Ballistic. Ballistic Unknown.

Dill Bit

 Common Used to access high-value items at Black Markets. Battle Royale Unknown.

Energy Cells

 Common Ammo originally used in the Zapotron. Battle Royale No longer used in any weapons.

Golden Ticket

 Mythic Pick up these tickets as fast as you can to win the game! Rally Royale Unknown.

Moonglow Crystal

 Epic Resource used for crafting. Save the World Unknown.

Nuts and Bolts

 Common Resource used for crafting. Save the World Unknown.

The Perfect Gift

 Uncommon Only uses as a quest item. Battle Royale Removed from the files.
Doesn't have any special function.

Outlaw Keycard

 Common Resource used to access The Backrooms at Black Markets. Battle Royale Removed from the files.
Uncommon
Rare
Epic
Legendary

Raptor Claw

 Mythic Could be traded for the location of Choppa Parts. Impossible Escape! Removed from the files.

Spectral Mineral Powder

 Common Resource used for crafting. Save the World Unknown.

Item Rarity Notes Origin Reason
Unique Items

Forecast Tower Access Card

 Legendary Used to interact with Forecast Towers. Battle Royale Removed from the files.

Solunar Key

 Mythic Used to access the vault in Nightshift Forest. Battle Royale The Solunar Key does not have a 3D model.

Unstable Element

 Epic Used to open a locked door near the Particle Accelerator at InnoLoop Labs. Battle Royale Unknown.

Underground Keycards

 Legendary Used to access various vaults during Chapter 5: Season 1. Battle Royale Unknown.

Vault Keycard

 Legendary Used to access various vaults. Battle Royale Unknown.

Vault Keycard

 Legendary Used to access various vaults. Battle Royale Unknown.
Alternate Versions of Present Items

Ghost Keycards

 Legendary Used to access the vault in The Agency and The Yacht. Battle Royale Unknown.

Last Resort Keycards

 Legendary Used to access the vault in MEGA City and Relentless Retreat, Rumble Ruins, Slappy Shores, and Sanguine Suites. Battle Royale Unknown.

Item Rarity Effect Origin Reason

Adrenaline Rush

 Rare Gain slap when you Mantle, Hurdle, or Wall Jump. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Combat Acrobat

 Rare Parkour (eg mantling) partially reloads your equipped weapon. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Fire Boon

 Rare Reload your weapons faster. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Gold Ammo

 Rare Recieve ammo when you pick up Bars. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Gold Rush

 Rare Opening containers grants the Gold Rush effect. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Greed

 Rare Recieve extra Bars from containers and eliminations. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Heightened Senses

 Rare Players who attack you are marked. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Speed Healer

 Rare Sprint while using healing items. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Storm Caller

 Rare Replenish shield while you're in the storm. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Void Boon

 Rare Knocking players reveals other nearby opponents. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Vulture Boon

 Rare Eliminated enemies will be marked on the map temporarily. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Water Boon

 Rare Swimming grants Health and Shields to you and nearby teammates. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Wind Boon

 Rare Move faster while your pickaxe is equipped. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Item Rarity Effect Origin Reason

Aspect of Agility

 Legendary Gain Underworld Dash charges over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Aspect of Combat

 Legendary Ranged weapons deal increased damage. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Aspect of Siphon

 Legendary Enables Siphon for the holder. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Aspect of Speed

 Legendary Increases sprint speed and jump height. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Birthday Medallion

 Legendary Grants Balloons over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Blitz Reveal Medallion

 Legendary Occasionally mark nearby enemies for a short duration. Blitz Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Infernal Defenses Medallion

 Legendary Increases reload speed and grants 1 shield per second up to 50 shield. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Megalo Don's Medallion

 Legendary Grants a permanent and unlimited nitro effect. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Montague's Medallion

 Legendary Replenishes the player's shield over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Night Rose Medallion

 Legendary Your equipped weapon is constantly loading magazine ammo. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Nisha's Medallion

 Legendary Replenishes the player's shield over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Oscar's Medallion

 Legendary Replenishes the player's shield over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Ringmaster Scarr's Medallion

 Legendary Grants the player infinite ammo and increased weapon damage. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Shogun X Medallion

 Legendary Grants infinite stamina and an invisible sprint.. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Shrouded Striker Medallion

 Legendary Sprint jumps have a low gravity effect and cloak the player. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Super Shield Medallion

 Legendary Spawns a Shield Bubble Jr. around you while you are healing (excludes throwables). Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

The Machinist's Medallion

 Legendary Replenishes the player's shield over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Unstoppable Medallion

 Legendary Increases your sprint speed. Sprint into players to knock them back. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Valeria's Medallion

 Legendary Replenishes the player's shield over time. Battle Royale No Boons or Medallions are currently present.

Item Notes Origin Reason Re-Creatable?
Unique Wildlife

Alien Parasites

 Hostile wildlife that can stick to the player to give speed boosts. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Bots

 Friendly or Hostile AI which replicates a player. Battle Royale Would likely require a lot of optimisation, but leaks suggest that they are being worked on. In a basic form using the NPC Spawner.

Bud The Mushroom

 A mushroom companion woken up by dancing. Battle Royale It was very buggy in Battle Royale. ?

Caretaker

 Massive hostile AI. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Crows

 Flying Wildlife. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Jumpscare Zombies

 Hostile AI that jumped out of objects to attack the player. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Klombo

 Large, neutral AI. Battle Royale Unknown, possibly too large and complex. ?

Llama

 Passive wildlife which flees from the player. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Loot Shark

 Hostile AI which can be ridden with a Fishing Rod. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Queen

 Hostile AI which shoots bomb shots at the player, digs in the ground, and spawn other bugs. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Shadows

 Hostile AI. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Sideways Monsters

 Hostile AI. Battle Royale Unknown, other cube monsters are available. ?

Storm King

 Hostile AI boss. Battle Royale A Storm King spawner was in the works and was never finished. ?

Tentacle Monster

 Hostile stationary AI. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Dark Voyager Drones

 Hostile AI summoned by the Dark Voyager (Reality Redacted). Battle Royale Unknown. ?
Alternate Versions of Present Wildlife

Gold Chicken

 Neutral wildlife which flees from the player and drops Golden Eggs. Battle Royale Bars are not available in Creative. ?

Raptor (CH2)

 Red and green version of the Raptor. Battle Royale Unknown, other wildlife has styles. ?

Shade Wolf

 Version of the Wolf that can perform an Underworld Dash. Battle Royale Unknown, other wildlife has styles. ?

Zombie Chicken

 Hostile Chicken. Battle Royale Unknown, other wildlife has styles. ?

Item Notes Origin Reason
Unique Containers

Academy Stand

 Container that spawns one High Tier item. Battle Royale Unknown.

Broom Barrel

 Containers that drops Witch Brooms. Battle Royale Unknown.

Bunker Chest

 Container which spawns High Tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Buried Chest

 Container which spawns Low Tier loot. Spawns buried in the ground. Battle Royale Unknown.

Buried Rare Chest

 Container which spawns High Tier loot. Spawns buried in the ground. Battle Royale Unknown.

Candy Bucket

 Container which spawns Candy. Battle Royale Unknown.

Cash Register

 Container which spawns Bars. Battle Royale Unknown.

Cold Blooded Coffer

 Container which spawns in vaults. Battle Royale Unknown.

Combat Cache

 Container which spawns High Tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Cosmic Chest

 Container which requires multiple players to open. Battle Royale Unknown.

Display Cases

 Container which a player can buy an item multiple times. Comes in multiple sizes and shelves too! Battle Royale Unknown.

Faction Chest

 Container which spawns at locations with no faction. Battle Royale Unknown.

GHOST Chest

 Container which spawns at GHOST owned locations. Battle Royale Unknown.

Golden Egg

 Foraged Item which spawns Bars upon interaction. Battle Royale Unknown.

Golden Supply Llama

 Container which spawns High Tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Grapple Glove Toolbox

 Container which spawns a Grappler Glove. Battle Royale Unknown.

Holo-Chest

 Locked container which spawns High-Tier loot. Also includes the Exotic variant. Battle Royale Unknown.

IO Supply Chest

 Container owned by the IO. Battle Royale Unknown.

Jetpack Container

 Container which spawns a Jetpack. Battle Royale Unknown.

Kinetic Blade Stand

 Container which spawns a Kinetic Blade. Battle Royale Unknown.

Kinetic Boomerang Pedestal

 Container which spawns a Kinetic Boomerang. Battle Royale Unknown.

Klomberry Bush

 Container which spawns a Klomberry. Battle Royale Unknown.

Loot Drone

 Container which spawns Weapons and Ammo when destroyed. Includes the normal, Ship It Express!, and Winterfest Ship It Express!. Battle Royale Unknown.

Mothership Vault Chest

 Containers of different rarities that spawn at The Mothership. Battle Royale Unknown.

Oni Mask Stand

 Container which spawns a Fire Oni Mask and Void Oni Mask. Battle Royale Unknown.

Ripsaw Launcher Container

 Container which spawns a Ripsaw. Battle Royale Unknown. Could be that it is very similar to the Item Placer

Safe

 Container which spawns Bars. Battle Royale Bars are unavailable in Creative.

Score Multiplier Crystal

 Container which spawns basic loot and increases your score multiplier. Horde Rush Unknown.

Seven Chest

 Container owned by The Seven. Battle Royale Unknown.

SHADOW Chest

 Container owned by SHADOW. Battle Royale Unknown.

Shooting Star

 Container that falls from the sky in Starry Suburbs and drops High-Tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Sideways Chest

 Containers which spawns High Tier loot and Sideways weapons. Battle Royale Unknown.

Silver Supply Llama

 Container which spawns Medium Tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Slap Berry Bush

 Container that spawns Slap Berries. Battle Royale Unknown.

Tool Box

 Ammo Box that also drops Vehicle Mods and Repair Torches. Battle Royale Unknown.

Train Chest

 Containers which spawns on the Train and Hot Air Balloons. Comes in black and gold, red and white, and blue and white. Battle Royale Unknown.

Train Heist Chest

 Container which spawns on the Train. Battle Royale Unknown.

Treasure Chest

 Container which spawns from Buried Treasure. Battle Royale Buried Treasure is not present.

Typhoon Blade Stand

 Container which spawns a Typhoon Blade. Battle Royale Unknown.

Vault Display Cases

 Container which a player can break and steal the item in it. Battle Royale Unknown.

Wonkeeland Cannon

 Container which spawns standard loot. Battle Royale Unknown.
Alternate Variants of Present Containers

Blitz Supply Drop

 Blitz version of the Supply Drop. Blitz Royale Unknown.

Blitz Chest

 Blitz exclusive chest. Drops High Tier loot and a Boon. Looks like the Olympus Chest, but with a blue and yellow glow coming out of it instead of only yellow. Blitz Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Camo)

 Camouflaged version of the Supply Drop. Battle Royale Unknown.

Care Package

 Container which gives basic loot and the Self-Revive Device. Battle Royale The Self-Revive Device isn't in creative.

Chrome Chest

 Container which gives out Chrome loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Fishing Barrel (CH2)

 Container which spawns by bodies of water. Battle Royale Unknown.

Health Drop

 Container which spawns from the Dial-A-Drop and drops healing consumables. Battle Royale Unknown.

Horde Rush Chest

 Container which spawns after destroying a Cube Creature Spawner in Horde Rush. Gives medium tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Horde Rush Chest (v9.21)

 Container which spawns after destroying a Cube Creature Spawner in Horde Rush. Gives medium tier loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Produce Box (CH2)

 Container which spawns foraged items. Battle Royale Unknown.

Rare Ammo Box

 Container which gives ammo and a healing item. Battle Royale Unknown.

Rare Chest

 Container which gives rare loot. Has 2 styles, one with only a blue glow, and one with a blue and orange glow. Battle Royale Unknown.

Suitcase of Patience

 A suitcase that tests your patience. Drops High Tier Loot. Battle Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Camo)

 Camouflaged version of the Supply Drop. Battle Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Christmas)

 Container which spawns from the sky late game and drops high tier loot. Now festive! Battle Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Driftboards attached)

 Container which spawns from the sky late game and drops high tier loot. Now with Driftboards! Battle Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Rally Royale)

 Container which spawns from the sky and drops golden tickets. Rally Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Red)

 Red version of the Supply Drop. Battle Royale Unknown.

Supply Drop (Safe)

 Safe version of the Supply Drop. The Getaway Unknown.

Feature Notes Origin Reason
Style Variants of Present Features

Automated Turret

 The Machinist's and Armored Train's variants are missing. Icon doesn't represent the visual look for The Machinist's Automated Turret. Battle Royale Unknown.

Barrier

 The barrier from the Food Fight LTM is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Bouncy Slurpshroom

 The half and brown variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Bouncer

 The stone variants are missing. Can also become a D-Launcher. Battle Royale Unknown.

Campfire

 The stone, pot, and og variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Crash Pad

 The Invasion, No-Sweat Insurance, Chapter 3: Season 3 summer, and Crash Pad Jr. variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Creature Spawner

 The Golden Sideways, Large Creature, Sideways, and Storm Creature Spawner variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Drop Pod

 All rank Drop Pods are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Dumpster

 The Chapter 2 and colour variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Fuel Pump

 The Chapter 1 and Primal variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Geyser

 The Slurp and timer variants are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Grind Rails

 The neon green, neon red, neon blue, neon purple, neon rail A, neon rail B, neon rail C, neon rail D, and music reactive neon rail. Battle Royale Unknown.

Grind Vines

 The variant with boost mushrooms and the pumpkin variant on it is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Mod Bench

 The Fortnitemares variant is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Physics Tree

 The Chapter 4 variant is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Port-A-Potty

 The modern, Lawless, and Burd variants are missing. Icons do not visually represent the Lawless Port-A-Potty. Battle Royale Unknown.

Primal Launcher

 The brown variant is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Reboot Van

 The Chapter 1 variant is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Starting Line

 A starting line where all races start. Unknown, as this look was the official look for the Race Manager in creative when it was first added. Unknown.

Rifts

 Blitz and corrupted version of the Rift. Icon does not represent the look of the Corrupted Rift. Blitz Royale
and
Battle Royale 		Unknown.

Vehicle Service Station

 The Burd variant is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Vending Machine

 Mending Machine, Malfunctioning Vending Machine, all Weapon-O-Matic Vending Machines, Ace's Armory Vending Machine, Ace's Exotic Vending Machine, Midas Vending Machine, Skillet Outlaw Vending Machine, Alpha Outlaw Vending Machine, Joss Outlaw Vending Machine, Keisha Cross Outlaw Vending Machine, Expertise Vending Machine, Monster Part Vending Machine, and Rare Monster Part Vending Machine. Battle Royale Unknown.

Feature Notes Origin Reason Re-Creatable?
Unique Features

Alien Launch Pad

 Launches the player in its direction. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes, using the Air Vent.

Alteration Altar

 Dance on it to gain the Howler Claws. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Burner Pay Phone

 Increases your Heat Level. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Cauldron

 A cauldron you can hide in or travel to a different location with. Reload Unknown. Yes.

Cube Field

 A field made by Kevin the Cube in which there is zero gravity. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Geothermal Cube Vent

 A vent that is made by corruption. Comes in orange. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Dormant Cube

 A cube which does nothing. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Garage Door

 A button activated door which can crush people who are underneath it. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Golden Cube

 A cube can make other cubes reproduce, roll in any direction, float, and attack with lightning. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Giant Snowball

 A Giant Snowball which players can hide in and roll around. Battle Royale Unknown, as similar features are available. No.

Haunted Household Furniture

 Furniture that is possessed by ghosts. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Intel Case

 Held over head, used to win the Operation: Infiltration LTM. Operation: Infiltration Unknown. ?

IO Scanner Console

 Scans a large area for opponents and containers. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Keycard Lock

 A device that needs a specific Keycard to open up a vault. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes, with the Conditional Button.

Kinetic Ore

 Physics-based rock that charges and then launches upon hit. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Large Bug Spawner

 A large spawner that spawns bugs. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Mud

 Covers the player in mud to hide them from items that use thermal and allows the player to slide faster. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Particle Accelerator

 Jump into it to ride it across the map. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Particle Accelerator Vault

 Vaults which have a rare chest behind it. Can only be opened with Unstable Element. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Pay Phones

 Offers random Character Quests to complete for a reward. Also comes in blue. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Physics Desert Rock

 A rock which falls and becomes physics-based when hit. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Propane Tank

 Shoot to cause an explosion. Can be carried. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Raptor Egg

 Spawns a Raptor if interacted with long enough. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Rebooted Cube

 Rebooted cube, which can heal the player, teleport, shoot lightning at the player, and make a shield around itself. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Revin the Cube

 A cube that can heal the player, roll in any direction, spawn rifts, give the player the Pepper Effect, and attack with lightning. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Runestone

 Held over head, used to redeem Spire Jump Boots. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Sentry Camera

 A camera which will make a loud noise upon spotting a player. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Small Bug Spawner

 A small spawner that spawns bugs. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Vaults

 A door which needs some sort of key to open. Includes the normal, rusty, Seven, Cold Blooded, Chapter 4 Season 4, Cell, and Stone. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Vending Machine Vehicle Spawner

 Spawns a vehicle when used. Party Royale exclusive. Party Royale Unknown, spawning location could contribute to why. ?

Whirlpools

 A water-based gyser that will boost you upwards upon entering it. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Zero Point

 A large glowing orb that has many different effects, such as rifting the player. Also has many different visual looks Battle Royale Unknown. ?
Missing from the Bouncer Gallery

Bouncy Triangle

 A red, bouncy triangle that makes you do flips in the air. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Bouncy Umbrellas

 Multiple bouncy umbrellas. Found all over the map with multiple designs. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Cube Floor (The Convergence)

 A bouncy Kevin the Cube floor. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Dance Floor Launch Pad

 A dance floor that launches you up in the air when you dance on it. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Garbage Hung Tires

 A very bouncy patch of hung tires. From the garbage islands from Chapter 2: Season 3, Primals from Chapter 2: Season 6, and the Port-A-Bunker. Battle Royale Unknown, as other tires are in the Bouncer Gallery. Yes.

Kevin the Cube Bouncy Lake Water

 Water that bounces you up high instead of being able to walk in it. Also comes in red. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Kevin the Cube Whirlpool

 A whirlpool that bounces you back up if jumped into. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Lilly Pads

 The non-Lotus Chapter 6 variant is missing altogether and both the Chapter 2 and 6 variants are missing from the Bouncer Gallery. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Racing Track Tires

 A very bouncy patch of racing track tires. From the Chonker's Speedway and the Racetrack landmark from Chapter 1. Battle Royale Unknown, as other tires are in the Bouncer Gallery. Yes.

Severed Decomposing Tentacle

 A giant, decomposing Tentacle that was severed off of the beast. Applies a slippery effect when touching it and bounces when you touch its boils. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Severed Tentacle

 A giant, bouncy Tentacle that was severed off of the beast. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Tires (Brutal Beachhead)

 Piles of bouncy tires. Now with a new design! Battle Royale Unknown, as other tires are in the Bouncer Gallery. Yes.

Tires (Chapter 3)

 Piles of bouncy tires. Now with a new design! Battle Royale Unknown, as other tires are in the Bouncer Gallery. Yes.

Tires (Other)

 Other bouncy tires. Battle Royale Unknown, as other tires are in the Bouncer Gallery. Yes.

Feature Notes Origin Reason Re-Creatable?
Unique Features

Abduction

 Abducts a player and teleports them to a different place. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Abductors

 An alien spaceship that hovers over specific areas and eventually abducts the player and teleports them. Battle Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Augments

 Augments modified each player's gameplay in various ways. Battle Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Battle Bus

 Ride the Battle Bus and jump out of it to dive and glide to your destination. Can also be driven by one lucky player. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Battle Bus Rings

 Drive the Battle Bus through one of these rings to get XP and spawn a Supply Drop. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Bounties

 Players must eliminate a specified opponent for a reward. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Capture Point

 A point which a team can capture and own a Location. Can also come in gold and/or with a dance stage too. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Car Boot

 Prevents a car from being driven. Battle Royale Unknown, potentially due to a lack of support from all vehicles. No.

Ceiling Storm

 A storm that comes from the top of the map instead of from the sides. Air Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Chest Rings

 Rings which gives the player different guns and gives the X-4 Stormwing a different gun based on rarity. Air Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Crafting

 Craft weapons using Resources. Battle Royale Unknown. Partially, using the Conditional Button, but in a limited form.

Cube Spawn

 Kevin the Cube spawning. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Dance Stage

 A floor that heals the player both shield and health when danced on. Demon Rush Unknown. Yes.

Dark Harvester

 A spaceship that'll attack back if attacked. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Destroyed Choppa

 A Choppa that can be repaired. Impossible Escape! Unknown. ?

Donation Station

 Donate to complete a global goal. Includes the normal, Seven, one with construction props, and the Fortnite OG. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Disco Floor

 A floor that needs to be danced on to be captured. Disco Domination Unknown. ?

Getaway Van

 Activate the van to win! The Getaway Specific in use case, only functions within a gamemode in the style of The Getaway. Yes.

Health and Repair Kit

 A Ring which heals the player and the X-4 Stormwing. Air Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Heat Level

 Increase your Heat Level by getting eliminations to unlock additional perks. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes, using the Stat Creator.

Hero Ranks

 Increase your Hero Rank by getting eliminations or surviving storm phases. Battle Royale Boons are not present. ?

Hologram Pads

 Temporarily applies various effects to the player. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Information Radio

 A radio used to inform the player what to do. The Getaway Requires a mechanic not yet optimized for Creative/UEFN. ?

Jungle Vault

 A vault in which you have to complete it in one of the following ways: give it an item with a rarity the same or higher than what it is asking for, extinguish torches in the correct order, or find a statue. Icons do not represent the torches. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Konami Code Easter Egg

 An Easter Egg that brings up an arcade like minigame where you shoot Durrr Burgers. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Legendary Loot Area

 An area which has better loot overall and spawns more rare chests. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Marauders

 A Pod that gets rifted into the island and releases a group of enemy AIs. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Meteor Strikes

 Meteors that strike down from the sky. Battle Royale Unknown, possibly difficult to implement into Creative. ?

Molten Gold

 Molten Gold that slowly rises. Midas Presents: The Floor is Lava Unknown, as the Water (Device) has similar features. Yes.

Payload

 A payload that needs to be escorted to a final destination. Operation: Payload Unknown. Yes.

Perks

 Buy a perk to gain a buff. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Phone Booth

 Enter to disguise a player into an AI faction. Battle Royale Unknown, as the Disguise Device, which has a similar function, is available. Yes, using the Disguise Device, but outfit options are currently limited to modern recruits.

Rising Lava

 Lava that slowly rises. Floor Is Lava Unknown, as the Water (Device) has similar features. Yes.

Rift Pod Spawn

 A pod that gets rifted into the map that the player spawns out of. Shockwave (LTM) Unknown. ?

Rift Zone

 A bubble in which a number of random effects can occur. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Rolling

 Kevin the Cube rolling. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Rift Anomalies

 A random event that occurs during gameplay. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Rivalries

 A board that starts a battle between 2 players on opposite factions. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Rift Spawn

 Spawn out of the sky via a Rift and dive and glide to your destination. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

SHADOW Briefings

 Interact with the device in order to receive a task that you must complete in a short amount of time. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes, using the Conversation Device and Tracker.

Sideways Encounter

 A rift which spawns a bubble that spawns waves of enemies the player needs to eliminate. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Signal Interference Bar

 A bar that protects you from The Storm. A Fortnite: China exclusive. Battle Royale Requires a mechanic not available in the international version of Fortnite. ?

Sprite Shrine

 Bring a Sprite to them to gain loot and a Boon. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Storm Shapes

 Different shapes of the storm besides a circle. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Storm Surge

 Players who deal the least amount of damage will be eliminated if there are too many players alive. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Storm Surfing

 Surf a wave and jump off of the board to dive and glide to your destination. Battle Royale Unknown. ?

Super Soldier Rank

 Increase your Super Soldier Rank by getting eliminations or surviving storm phases. Battle Royale Boons are not present. ?

Timer Orb

 An orb that increases your timer for how long you last in the Mothership's minigame. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

The Wall Of Water

 A wall of water, allowing for underwater swimming, that acts like The Storm. Battle Royale Unknown, may be difficult to implement. No.

Training Target

 Targets which give you points upon shooting them. Can also be enabled to drop loot when destroyed. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Upgrade Bench

 A bench that allows you to upgrade items to a higher rarity. Also has a monster part variant. Battle Royale Unknown, may be difficult to implement. No.

Vault Orb

 An orb that increases your loot level in the Mothership's minigame. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Wastelander Challenges

 Interact with the device in order to apply a status effect that makes gameplay more difficult in exchange for additional XP after a victory. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Weapon Bunkers

 A bunker which opens after a certain amount of time or with a player's Super Soldier Rank. Also has a locked up and Supernova Academy variant that isn't shown here. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Weather

 Weather effects, such as Tornadoes, Lightning, and the Chrome Tornado, that interact with gameplay. Battle Royale Unknown, may be difficult to implement. ?

X-4 Stormwing Weapons

 Different weapons that the X-4 Stormwing can get during Air Royale. Air Royale Requires a mechanic not yet optimised for Creative/UEFN. ?

Item Notes Origin Reason Re-Creatable?
Unique Foraged Items

Cabbage

 Slowly grants HP after consuming. Available as an item in the Content Browser. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes,

Corn

 Slowly grants HP after consuming. Available as an item in the Content Browser. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Coconut

 Slowly grants HP or Shields after consuming. Available as an item in the Content Browser. Battle Royale Unknown, possibly due to bugs. Yes.

Glitched

 Randomly switches between different consumables. Battle Royale Quickly disabled due to issues in Battle Royale. No.

Havoc Stone

 Gives the Nitro effect to the player when consumed. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Shadow Stone

 Transforms the player into a Shadow with various effects. Battle Royale Disabled multiple times in Battle Royale due to issues. No.

Spicy Taco

 Heals effective health and grants a speed boost. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Zero Point Crystal

 Grants a temporary dash ability. Battle Royale Unknown. No.
Alternate Versions of Present Items

Mythic Mushroom

 Alternate version of the Mushroom. Grants 100 Shield. Battle Royale Very buggy (eg picking it up will turn it into a normal mushroom) as it was only meant as an easter egg. Yes.

Cosmetic Notes Target Mode Reason
Unique Cosmetics

Auras

 Activates when you get the maximum multiplier by consistently hitting correct notes. Unknown Mode Unknown, as there are various ways it could be integrated into Creative (eg a device that activates the player's Aura).

Lego Builds

 A building that players can place down and construct ingame in Lego Fortnite Odyssey. LEGO Fortnite Difficult to implement into Lego Fortnite Creative due to it having different grid sizes to Lego Fortnite Odyssey.

Lego Decor Bundles

 A collection of LEGO assets that players can place down ingame in Lego Fortnite Odyssey. LEGO Fortnite Difficult to implement into Lego Fortnite Creative due to it having different grid sizes to Lego Fortnite Odyssey.
Uses of Cosmetics

Moments

 Play your selected Jam Tracks while skydiving and after a victory. Battle Royale Unknown, similar situation to Auras.

Feature Notes Origin Reason Re-Creatable?
Unique Features

Bubble Effect

 Creates a bubble around the player that bounces. Battle Royale The Hologram Pad is not available. No.

Chrome Blob

 Allows the player to transform into a blob of Chrome when sprinting. Battle Royale Chrome is not available. No.

Durrr Burger Mask

 The player wears a Durrr Burger mask, signifying what team they are on. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Kits

 The player becomes a boss, increasing their size, health, shield, and giving them an ability. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Sand Tunneling

 Stop moving in sand in order to sink into it and travel quickly. Battle Royale Frequently disabled due to issues. No.

Shockwave Damage

 Instead of getting rid of health after getting damaged, the player gains damage and gets knocked back more and more. Shockwave (LTM) Unknown. ?

Tomatohead Mask

 The player wears a Tomatohead mask, signifying what team they are on. Battle Royale Unknown. Yes.

Shadows

 The player becomes a Shadow on death, gaining new abilities. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Training Aura

 The higher placement you are, the better the Aura you get. This aura gives the player a multitude of buffs. Battle Royale Unknown. No.

Vehicle Notes Origin Reason
Unique Vehicles

Anti-Personnel Turret

 Turret with a fast fire rate. Also appears on the Titan Tank and the Seven's version of the Titan Tank with different looks. Icons do not represent the Titan Tank's Anti-Personnel Turret's looks. Battle Royale Unknown.

B.R.U.T.E.

 Two-seater armored mech. Battle Royale Disabled as it was still running the old physics system and there were many game-breaking glitches with the B.R.U.T.E.

Salvaged B.R.U.T.E.

 Two-seater armored mech. Battle Royale Base vehicle was disabled.
Boss Vehicles

Behemoth

 An SUV with a Spiked Bumper, Grenade Launcher Turret, and Bulletproof Tires. Always has the Nitro effect. Battle Royale It is an SUV cosmetic.

Lockjaw

 Two seater car with a Spiked Bumper, Machine Gun Turret, and Bulletproof Tires. Always has the Nitro effect. Battle Royale It is an Sports Car cosmetic.
Alternate Versions of Present Vehicles

Anti-Vehicle Turret

 The War Bus style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Armored Battle Bus

 The Party Bus style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Choppa

 The Seven style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Quadcrasher

 The Crackshot style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Mudflap

 The Decayed, Holiday Big Rig, IO, and Party styles are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Prevalent

 The IO and Party styles are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Tank

 The Seven style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Whiplash

 The Baron, Camo, Decayed, Party, and Super Circuit styles are missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

X-4 Stormwing

 The Operation Snowdown style is missing. Battle Royale Unknown.

Mod Notes Origin Reason
Weapon Mods

Weapon Mod: P2X Optic

 x2 magnification optic. Battle Royale Vaulted from Battle Royale and therefore it was likely removed from the Creative Mod Bench as an oversight, as both modes share the same bench.
Vehicle Mods

Lowrider Hydraulics

 Allows a car to bounce. Battle Royale Potentially a reference to Snoop Dogg, and therefore potentially a collaboration item.

Please refrain from editing the page if another user is actively doing so as to avoid edit conflicts.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Salty Springs

 Small village with houses. Season 1 Unknown.
POIs using Shared Assets

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Lazy Lake

 City with a lake nearby. Chapter 2: Season 1 Unknown.

The Grotto

 Underground facility located beneath a mountain. Chapter 2: Season 2 Unknown.

Catty Corner

 Fortified box factory with a gas station nearby. Chapter 2: Season 3 Unknown.

Stealthy Stronghold

 Large walled-off jungle biome. Chapter 2: Season 5 Unknown.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Rocky Reels

 Outdoor theatre in a desert. Chapter 3: Season 1 Unknown.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Frenzy Fields

 A modern farm with solar panels. Chapter 4: Season 1 Unknown.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Ritzy Riviera

 Small coastal town. Chapter 5: Season 1 Unknown.
POIs using Shared Assets

Pleasant Piazza

 Small European town. Shares assets with Fencing Fields. Chapter 5: Season 1 Unknown.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Brutal Boxcars

 A storage unit with a train track. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Shining Span

 A long bridge that spans over the bay near Utopia City. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Shattered Span

 Broken version of Shining Span. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Lost Lake

 A temple beside a lake. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Whiffy Wharf

 A costal town with a sushi restaurant. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Hopeful Heights

 A small town home to Hope. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Masked Meadows

 A medium sized town with underground sewers. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Pumped Power

 A large power plant that powers the island. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

Foxy Floodgate

 A large hydro-electric dam. Chapter 6: Season 1 Unknown.

The Hive

 A large hive home to one of the bug queens. Chapter 6: Season 4 Unknown.

Swarmy Stash

 A storage site for the swarm. Chapter 6: Season 4 Unknown.

Ranger's Ruin

 An O.X.R. base that was overrun by the swarm. Chapter 6: Season 4 Unknown.

O.X.R. HQ

 Base of the O.X.R., a faction dedicated to wiping out the bugs. Chapter 6: Season 4 Unknown.

Location Notes Introduced Reason
POIs with Unique Assets

Snobby Shoals

 A miniature version of Snobby Shores. Chapter 5: Season 3 Unknown.

Adobe Abodes

 A miniature version of Snobby Shores. Chapter 2 Remix Unknown.

Subpage Link: Missing Features (Creative)/Galleries

Most Collaboration Items (except for epic-owned IPs such as Infinity Blade and Rocket League) are not included due to copyright and licensing issues. They may be added in the future through contracts between Epic and the IP holder, however they will most likely be exclusive to creators part of the epic creator program (similar to the TMNT collaboration).

  • Marvel
  • Star Wars
  • DC
  • Films & TV
  • Gaming
  • Music
  • Icon Series
  • Other

Feature Rarity Notes Mode
Weapons

Chitauri Energy Rifle

 Mythic Projectiles explode in proximity to players. Battle Royale

Chitauri Laser Rifle

 Mythic Infinite Ammo Laser Rifle. Battle Royale

Deadpool's Dual Hand Cannons

 Mythic Dual Wield Hand Cannons dropped by the Deadpool AI. Siphons health. Battle Royale

Doctor Doom's Arcane Gauntlets

 Mythic Fire arcane blasts from your fingertips or concentrate your energy into a mystical bomb to devastate your enemies. Battle Royale

Doctor Doom's Monarch Pistol

 Mythic Automatic Pistol. Very effective at close range. Battle Royale

Emma Frost's Striker Burst AR

 Mythic Emma Frost's personal Striker AR. High precision and fast fire rate makes it easy to put foes on ice. Battle Royale

Gwenpool's Dual Micro SMGs

 Mythic Gwenpool's personal Dual Micro SMGs, it goes pew pew pew really fast. Battle Royale

Hawkeye's Bow

 Mythic Bow which pulls the player towards its projectile. Battle Royale

Iron Man's Combat Kit

 Mythic Lock-on to targets and fire energy blasts, or launch a piercing Unibeam attack. Battle Royale

Iron Man's Repulsors

 Mythic Player has a low gravity, easy to aim energy weapon. Allows the player to hover. Battle Royale

Magneto Power

 Rare A pair of curious gauntlets seemingly imbued with the power to control Metal with the user's mind and gestures. Battle Royale

Mysterio's Sovereign Shotgun

 Mythic Personal Modular Sovereign Shotgun of Mysterio. Battle Royale

Shuri's Black Panther Claws

 Epic Shuri's own Black Panther Claws enable the wearer to swiftly navigate the battlefield. The weapon absorbs kinetic energy that can be used to supercharge its devastating offensive capabilities. Battle Royale

Stark Industries Energy Rifle

 Rare Full Auto when hipfired, Semi Auto when aimed. Battle Royale
Epic
Legendary

Thor's Stormbreaker

 Mythic Melee weapon which can be thrown. Battle Royale

Updated Stark Industries Energy Rifle

 Legendary Full Auto when hipfired, Semi Auto when aimed. Battle Royale

War Machine's Arsenal

 Mythic Unleash a hailstorm of bullets and rockets at your enemies. Battle Royale
Items

Captain America's Shield

 Epic Wield Captain America's vibranium shield and block incoming damage or throw it to hit & bounce between opponents. Charge into enemies when tactical sprinting to send them reeling. Battle Royale
Mythic

Stark Industries' Keycard

 Legendary Keycard to access the Stark Industries Vault. Battle Royale

Avengers Buried Treasure

 Mythic Allows the player to locate Avengers weaponry. Battle Royale

Yacht Keycard

 Legendary Keycard to access The Yacht Vault. Battle Royale

Dr Doom's Keycard

 Legendary Keycard to access the Vault of Doom. Battle Royale

Carnage Symbiote

 Mythic Pulls enemies closer to you. Increases player movement speed and allows for Glider Redeploy. Battle Royale

Venom Symbiote

 Mythic Pulls enemies closer to you. Increases player movement speed and allows for Glider Redeploy. Battle Royale

War Machine's Auto Turret

 Epic Vigilant shoulder-mounted auto-turret that provides battle-ready support fire. Battle Royale

War Machine's Hover Jets

 Epic Traverse the battle in the air while firing weapons with precision. Battle Royale

Stark Jetpack

 Epic Mr. Stark has provided this fully equipped flight system for the coming fight against Galactus. Initiate by Jumping while in air. Battle Royale

Chitauri Jetpack

 Mythic Allows the player to hover in the air for a short time. Battle Royale

Iron Man's Flight Kit

 Mythic Fly across the map at blistering speeds with Iron Man's Flight Kit. Press the fire button while flying to quickly change direction, speed up, and ram into players and structures. If Iron Man's Combat Kit is also in your inventory, press alt-fire while flying to use your Unibeam attack without exiting flight. Battle Royale

Spider Man's Web Shooters

 Mythic Allows the player to traverse through the air by swinging from surface to surface. Battle Royale

Spider-Verse Web Shooters

 Mythic Aim at the environment and hold the fire button to swing through the air. Shoot at pick-ups to pull them to you. Battle Royale

Iron Man's Repulsor Gauntlets

 Mythic Employ Iron Man's Repulsors to fire energy blasts and to boost yourself into the sky. Battle Royale

Booster Jets

 Rare Employ Iron Man's Repulsors to fire energy blasts and to boost yourself into the sky. Battle Royale

Iron Man's Unibeam

 Mythic Charge up and fire Iron Man's Unibeam, damaging all targets in its path. Battle Royale

Doctor Doom's Arcane Gauntlets (Chapter 2)

 Mythic Doctor Doom's Arcane Gauntlets with its OG stats and icon. Battle Royale

Levitate

 Rare Harness the power of Doctor Doom. Fire mystical energy projectiles from your fingertips. Exert dominance over gravity with an otherworldly leap. Battle Royale

Doctor Doom's Mystical Bomb

 Mythic Conjure and throw a large ball of arcane energy that explodes on impact. Battle Royale

Wolverine's Claws

 Mythic Melee attack which heals the player continuously. Battle Royale

Air Dash

 Rare Secondary Item for Wolverine's Claws. Battle Royale

She-Hulk’s Fists

 Mythic Gain the strength of She-Hulk. Unleash powerful melee attacks and a mighty leap-and-smash. Battle Royale

Leap Smash

 Rare Secondary Item for She-Hulk’s Fists. Battle Royale

Thor's Mjolnir Strike

 Mythic Call down Thor's hammer, dealing damage to all enemies in an area. Battle Royale

Black Panther's Kinetic Armor

 Mythic Activate Black Panther's Kinetic Armor. Resist damage and move with the speed of a panther. After a short duration, a kinetic blast deals damage and knocks away enemies. Battle Royale

Venom’s Smash & Grab

 Mythic Throw a punch with a symbiote arm that smashes through the environment, grabs enemies, and pulls them toward you. Battle Royale

Silver Surfer's Board

 Mythic Launch into the air and carve up the skies with Silver Surfer's Board. Reactivate to cancel early. Battle Royale

Groot's Bramble Shield

 Mythic Be enveloped in Groot's embrace. Block incoming damage and heal nearby players. Reactivate to cancel early. I am Groot. Battle Royale

Storm's Whirlwind Blast

 Mythic Unleash the power of Storm! Push away opponents and clear out your immediate surroundings. Battle Royale
Medallions

Doombot's Siphon Medallion

 Legendary You gain Siphon on eliminations. Battle Royale

Emma Frost's Reveal Medallion

 Legendary Occasionally mark nearby enemies for a short duration. Battle Royale

Mysterio's Stealth Medallion

 Legendary When crouching, activate cloaking. Cloaking ends when ending crouch or attacking. Battle Royale
AI

Gatherers

 N/A AI that attacks players. Can be picked up by the player once eliminated. Battle Royale

Gorgers

 N/A AI that attacks players. Battle Royale

 N/A A chest that spawns high-level loot. Battle Royale

 N/A A container that spawns Spider-Man's Web Shooters. Battle Royale

Stark Industries Chest

 N/A A chest that spawns high-level loot. Battle Royale

 N/A A container which fell from the sky that spawns the Carnage Symbiote and Venom Symbiote. Battle Royale

Armor of Doom

Item Rarity Description Mode
Items

Batman Grapnel Gun

 Mythic Pull yourself towards a target location and then deploy the Bat Cape! Battle Royale

Explosive Batarang

 Mythic Batman's Batarang. Homes in on players and sticks to walls. Explodes if it detects enemies in proximity. Battle Royale

Wingshot Grappler

 Mythic Pull yourself towards a target location and then deploy the Robin Glider! Battle Royale

Krypto Treat

 Mythic Throw a superpowered dog treat – Krypto will come crashing down where it lands! Battle Royale

Superman Call

 Mythic Fly around as Superman! Battle Royale

Item Rarity Description Brand Mode

Airbending

 Mythic Harness the air around you to enhance your mobility. Use air-wheel to traverse or air-jump to launch yourself and others. Avatar: The Last Airbender Battle Royale

Bender's Shiny Metal Raygun

 Mythic Built with love, hugs, and continuous-flow plasma by MomCorp. Futurama Battle Royale

Boom Billy

 Rare Autonomous flying explosive disguised as Billy that chases after unsuspecting victims. SAW Battle Royale

Capsule Corp. Drops

 N/A Container that drops from the sky containing the Kamehameha and Nimbus Cloud (Kintoun). My Hero Academia Battle Royale

Cybertron Cannon

 Mythic Cybertronian heavy weapon that’s more than meets the eye. Transformers Battle Royale

Deku's Smash

 Mythic Throw a punch that sends shockwaves through the world, blasting through buildings and enemies alike. My Hero Academia Battle Royale

Drake's Map

 Legendary Marks a spot on the map to find high-tier loot. Uncharted Battle Royale

Earthbending

 Mythic Summon chunks of earth to hurl at foes or form defensive barriers. Avatar: The Last Airbender Battle Royale

Firebending

 Mythic Launch arcs of fire or slam down in a fiery explosion. Avatar: The Last Airbender Battle Royale

Hollow Purple

 Mythic Cursed technique that erases structures in its path and deals damage over time. Jujutzu Kaisen Battle Royale

Kamehameha

 Mythic Famed Ki attack of the Kame School. Charge up and release a massive beam of Ki energy. Dragon Ball Z Battle Royale

My Hero Academia Supply Drop

 N/A Container dropping Deku's Smash and Todoroki's Ice Wall. My Hero Academia Battle Royale

Nimbus Cloud (Kintoun)

 Mythic Launches the player upwards into glider redeploy. Dragon Ball Z Battle Royale

ODM Gear

 Mythic Omni-Directional Mobility Gear. Grapple, soar, hover, and attack enemies with blades. Attack on Titan Battle Royale

Paper Bomb Kunai

 Mythic Explosive throwing knife. Naruto Battle Royale

Scout Regiment Footlocker

 N/A Container containing the ODM Gear and Thunder Spears. Attack on Titan Battle Royale

Ship In a Bottle

 Mythic Releases a cursed ship that dives into opponents on impact. Pirates of the Carribean Battle Royale

Straw Doll Technique

 Mythic Hammer combo that launches nails filled with cursed energy. Jujutzu Kaisen Battle Royale

Thunder Spears

 Mythic Arm-launched rockets designed to pierce armored structures. Attack on Titan Battle Royale

Todoroki's Ice Wall

 Mythic Summon huge walls of ice for defense. Can be placed at range by aiming. My Hero Academia Battle Royale

Waterbending

 Mythic Hurl ice projectiles; heals passively when in water. Avatar: The Last Airbender Battle Royale

Predator's Cloaking Device

 Mythic Go almost invisible for a short duration. Predator Battle Royale

Godzilla's Fragment

 Mythic Consume to restore health and gain dash charges. Godzilla Battle Royale

Godzilla's Medallion

 Legendary Regain dash charges over time for quick mobility bursts. Godzilla Battle Royale

Peter Griffin's Hammer Pump Shotgun

 Mythic Peter Griffin’s personal Hammer Pump Shotgun. Family Guy Battle Royale

Peter Griffin's Medallion

 Legendary Automatically regenerates shields; regen speed scales with Medallions held. Family Guy Battle Royale

Saitama's Medallion

 Legendary Instantly knock players and destroy structures with a single pickaxe hit, at the cost of slightly slower swing speed. Also passively grants a movement speed boost. One Punch Man Blitz Royale

Blade Blaster

 Mythic A dual-mode pistol: fires quick, snappy shots in hip-fire, and powerful explosive rounds when aiming down sights. Power Rangers Battle Royale

Rita Repulsa's Boon

 Legendary Gain Light Ammo, Medium Ammo, and Shells over time. Power Rangers Battle Royale

Megazord's Medallion

 Legendary Occasionally marks nearby opponents. Power Rangers Battle Royale

Megazord

 N/A Steer the Megazord! Power Rangers Battle Royale

Rita's Supply Comet

 N/A Container that falls from the sky. Drops high tier loot. Power Rangers Battle Royale

Last Call

 Legendary Mark nearby enemies and quickly slash them down with a fast melee combo. Ghostface Battle Royale

Stalkbox

 N/A Grants the Last Call when a player interacts with it Ghostface Battle Royale

Scooby Snacks

 Epic Use continuously for healing, speed boost and infinite stamina. Goes well with a bowl of water. Scooby-Doo Battle Royale
